heroBadge: Precision Agriculture · AI-Powered · Trusted by 1,200+ Farmers
heroSub: From unpredictable weather to unhealthy soil — AgriSense gives every farmer the precision tools once reserved for large agribusiness corporations.
drHeroSub: Identify diseases, pests, and nutrient deficiencies in seconds. Just snap a picture of the affected crop leaf to get actionable remedy plans.
drUploadSub: Take a clear photo of the affected plant leaf. Make sure the subject is well lit.
drDisclaimer: AI predictions may not be 100% accurate. Always consult with a local agricultural expert before applying potent chemicals.
drSupports: Supports JPG, PNG, WEBP, up to 10MB
drSomethingWentWrong: Something went wrong during the analysis.
drTip1Desc: Avoid shadows and direct harsh sunlight.
drTip2Desc: Keep the infected area in clear focus.
drTip3Desc: Isolate one leaf for higher AI accuracy.
probDesc1: Farmers lack accurate, localized forecasting tools. Sudden rains, droughts, and unseasonal frost destroy entire harvests with no warning. Traditional weather services fail at the field-level precision farmers need.
probStatLabel1: Annual crop loss due to climate shocks in India
probTitle2: No Proper Tool to Check Crop Health
probDesc2: Farmers have no reliable way to detect crop diseases, pest infestations, or nutrient deficiencies early. By the time visible damage appears, significant yield loss has already occurred — and costly guesswork treatments begin.
probStatLabel2: Average yield lost to undetected diseases and pests each season
probDesc3: Farmers receive soil and crop health reports filled with technical jargon — CO₂ levels, nitrogen PPM, pH indices — written entirely in English. Most rural farmers speak regional languages and cannot act on advice they cannot understand.
probStatLabel3: Of Indian farmers cannot read or act on English-language agri-reports
probTitle: The Challenges Farmers Face Every Day
probDesc: Indian agriculture employs over 60% of the rural workforce, yet farmers continue to lose billions annually due to three core, preventable problems.
probCallout: "These aren't separate problems. They are a single broken system — and AgriSense fixes all three."
solTitle:
A Total Rethink of
Precision Agriculture
solDesc: AgriSense integrates satellite imagery, IoT soil sensors, and hyperlocal AI weather models into a single, farmer-first platform available in 10 regional languages.
solStepDesc1: Deploy solar-powered soil sensors in under 10 minutes. No wiring required. Real-time data to your phone instantly.
solStepDesc2: Our proprietary model fuses 14 satellite feeds with 1,200 ground stations for 94% accurate field-level forecasts up to 7 days ahead.
solStepDesc3: Personalized daily recommendations — when to irrigate, fertilize, or harvest — based on live field data and crop stage.
dashAlert1: 🌧️ Irrigate Field B by 6 AM tomorrow
featTitle: Everything You Need, Nothing You Don't
feat1Desc: Field-level weather predictions powered by 14 satellite feeds and dense ground station network. Know exactly when to irrigate, spray, and harvest.
feat2Desc: IoT sensors relay NPK, pH, moisture, and temperature every 15 minutes directly to your dashboard.
feat3Desc: Upload a photo or use satellite NDVI to detect pest infestations, diseases, and nutrient deficiencies before they spread.
feat4Desc: Receive crop-specific action items every morning — in your local language — based on live field data tailored to your exact location.
feat5Desc: AgriSense speaks your language. All reports, alerts, and advisories are delivered in Hindi, Punjabi, Marathi, Tamil, Telugu, and 8 more regional languages — no English required.
feat6Desc: Get 10-meter resolution field maps updated bi-weekly from ESA Sentinel-2 and ISRO RISAT satellites. Monitor entire farm health visually — from space.
techDesc: AgriSense is not a simple app. It's an end-to-end precision agriculture platform engineered to deliver results that farmers can measure.
tech1Desc: Pest detection accuracy using our multi-class convolutional neural network trained on 2M+ annotated field images.
tech2Desc: Deployed soil sensors across 8 Indian states, forming the country's largest hyperlocal agricultural IoT network.
tech3Desc: Agricultural data processed daily from satellites, ground sensors, weather models, and farmer mobile inputs combined.
tech4Desc: Operational across 18 Indian states with full IoT coverage, satellite field mapping, and regional language support.
test1Quote: "AgriSense's weather alerts saved my entire wheat crop from an unseasonal frost. I received a warning 36 hours before the rest of the village even knew there was a forecast."
test2Quote: "Mera soil score pehle 42 tha. AgriSense ke recommendations follow karke, ek season mein 79 ho gaya. Aur fertilizer ka kharch bhi kam hua."
test3Quote: "The market price intelligence feature alone paid for my entire subscription. I waited 9 days after harvest and got ₹200 more per quintal than my neighbours."
hiw1Desc: Push the solar-powered soil sensor into your field. No wiring, no tools. Pairs to your phone via Bluetooth in 60 seconds.
hiw2Desc: Tell AgriSense what you're growing, when you planted it, and your field boundaries. Our AI does the rest.
hiw3Desc: Get your personalized morning advisory via WhatsApp, SMS, or the app — and watch your yield improve season after season.

ctaSub: Join 1,200+ early-access farmers already using AI to grow smarter. No technical knowledge required. Works on any smartphone.

footerTagline: Precision farming intelligence for every Indian farmer. From soil to sky, we've got you covered.
